_doc: Tunable parameters for brain/curriculum.py. See docs/AVA_FEATURE_ADDITIONS_2026-05.md §3.

consolidation._paragraph_seconds_doc: Approximate time-per-paragraph budget. Slower = more thorough lesson extraction; faster = more entries per sleep cycle.

selection._doc: How consolidation_hook picks the next entry.
selection._prefer_in_flight_doc: If an entry is mid-read (status=reading), resume it before picking a new one.
